results.description:
ANIMAL KINDERGARTEN GAMES brings a delightful learning experience to kids, blending education with entertainment in the most engaging way possible! With a colorful array of adorable animal friends, from Rocco the Rooster to Oliver Horse, children will navigate more than 100 fun kindergarten games. These activities are specifically designed to help your child improve their kindergarten skills while enjoying a thrilling adventure across a bustling city filled with curious animals.

KINDERGARTEN HAS NEVER BEEN THIS FUN!

Whether your child is in kindergarten or preparing for kindergarten, Animal Kindergarten Games is the perfect platform for building strong kindergarten skills. Designed by parents and teachers, this game adheres to learning standards used in real classrooms, ensuring an educational foundation that aligns with school curriculums. It’s ideal for reinforcing what kids are learning in school or giving them a head start in kindergarten and 1st grade.

KEY FEATURES

• Kindergarten Lessons: Learn essential kindergarten concepts like shapes, colors, counting, and more.
• Animal Kindergarten: Join fun animal pals on a learning journey, helping them solve kindergarten challenges in a lively city environment.
• Kindergarten Games: Over 100 fun and educational kindergarten activities designed to make learning exciting and rewarding for young learners.
• Kindergarten Games for Kids: Perfectly suited for kids ages 3–7, with professional narration, lively music, and positive reinforcement to keep them motivated.
• Kindergarten Learning for Kids: Enjoy a wide variety of free-to-play levels, ensuring children can practice and build kindergarten skills without limitations.

KINDERGARTEN MADE EASY

Designed to support young learners, Animal Kindergarten Games offers a range of interactive exercises to help children grasp critical kindergarten concepts. From counting to problem-solving, every activity is tailored to ensure kids build a strong foundation. Whether they are tackling early number skills or engaging in first grade learning games, the experience grows with your child’s abilities.

EDUCATIONAL GAMES FOR KIDS FREE

This game focuses on kindergarten learning while also extending into first grade skills for continued growth. Kids will have fun while practicing counting, comparing numbers, and solving puzzles — making kindergarten a joyous adventure.

results.description:
Educating over 15 million kids in classrooms across the world, the award winning Eggroll Games team presents an all new number learning adventure for toddlers!

Follow Sully Shark, Ralphie Cat, and Chill E. Penguin out of the aquarium, across the backyard, and all the way to Antarctica as you complete counting, sequence, and number challenges to unlock over 30 interactive prizes!

With 27 difficulty levels to master across 9 unique mini-apps, there's lots to do and lots to learn!

NUMBER RECOGNITION
• Choose the correct number from a group
• Tap the peeking number in peek-a-boo
• Drag the number to the correct slot

COUNTING
• Touch items to count them
• Put the correct number of items in the basket

CARDINALITY
• Pop the bubble with the correct number of items
• Pick the number that corresponds with the number of items

SEQUENCE
• Find the number missing from the sequence
• Put the numbers in order
• Connect the dots

ADDITIONAL FEATURES
• Learners earn prizes as they play
• Turn off mini-apps to customize your lesson
• Play with collected prizes in the toy box
• Mini-app icon meters show progress
• A friction-free, safe space for learning

“As parents and teachers, we believe in friction-free learning for kids of all ages. We strive to build fun experiences with eye-popping visuals, professional narration, catchy music, and lots of positive encouragement.

Thank you for supporting us and making our vision come to life.

Have fun!”

- Blake, Amanda, Mike & Urszula, Eggroll Games

results.description:
Sing along to a catchy rhyme and toe-tapping music as you learn to identify your colors with a cast of cute and colorful characters, foods, toys and objects.

This game was designed by parents and teachers to promote cognitive development and sharpen motor skills in early learners.

COLOR IDENTIFICATION 
• Identify different objects of the same color
• Hear the item and color spoken aloud 
• See each color in word form

FRICTION-FREE LEARNING
• Incorrect answers are removed to promote positive play
• Whack-a-color game and balloon popping rewards
• Hints ensure early learners never get frustrated

ADDITIONAL FEATURES: 
• Professionally narrated rhymes and catchy jazz music
• Parental controls: Turn off sound, music, purchases, links
• We do not collect personal information from our users

BONUS FEATURES:
• Shape games available with an additional purchase 

“As parents and teachers, we believe in friction-free learning for kids of all ages. We strive to build fun experiences with eye-popping visuals, professional narration, catchy music, and lots of positive encouragement.

Thank you for supporting us and making our vision come to life.

Have fun!!”

- Blake, Mike & Amanda, Eggroll Games

results.description:
Join math-explorer Emma on a globetrotting adventure through more than 100 math games including Pre-K, Kindergarten, 1st, and 2nd grade!

Learning features (Pre-K to Grade 2)

Counting and Early Number Sense
• Counting and skip counting by 2s, 5s, and 10s
• Start counting from any number
• Connect counting to numerals and answer “How many?”
• Compare and order numbers

Place Value (Base Ten)
• Understand ones, tens, and hundreds place value
• Compose and decompose numbers using ones and tens, then extend to hundreds
• Use expanded form

Addition and Subtraction Facts
• Add and subtract with objects and visuals
• Mental math within 5 and 10, and beyond
• Fact families and strategies such as making 10 and counting on or back

Equations and Number Sentences
• Identify parts of an equation including addends, sum, difference, and the equals sign
• Build number sentences and solve for the missing number
• Tackle multi step and complex equations appropriate for early learners

Even and Odd
• Identify, sort, and explain even and odd numbers

Comparison and Symbols
• Greater than, less than, or equal to using words, symbols, and pictures

Word Problems and Reasoning
• One and two step story problems
• Choose the correct operation
• Use visuals and models to explain thinking

Patterns and Sorting
• Recognize AB, AAB, ABB, and ABC patterns
• Extend, complete, and create patterns
• Classify and sort by attributes such as color, size, and type

Why teachers and parents choose it
• No ads
• No subscriptions
• No external links
• No data collected
• Kid safe and COPPA compliant
• Works offline for home, travel, and classrooms with limited Wi-Fi
• Classroom ready and aligned with widely used school standards and math frameworks
• Professional narration, clear visuals, and positive encouragement
• Used in classrooms all over the world

Friendly animals such as cows, chickens, lions, giraffes, kittens, and puppies, plus robots and silly monsters, keep learners smiling while they build real math confidence.

Download Animal Math Games for Kids and help your learner grow number sense, place value, addition, subtraction, patterns, equations, and word problem skills today.

Apple Terms of Service (EULA)
https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

results.description:
Explore the farm with a counting sheep named Sherman, Pete the mischievous matching frog and all the barn animals you love as you join Lily the farmer through 100 fun learning games on a quest to help her barnyard buddies find a way home!

Playable by kids of all ages with lots of positive encouragement, professional narration and catchy music. Cute farm animals include cow, chicken, goat, pig, sheep, duck and frog! 

Designed by parents and teachers for pre-k kindergarten preparation, this app adheres to Common Core Standards for kindergarten math.

COUNTING & NUMBER RECOGNITION 
• Count forward from 1 to 10 
• Connect counting to numbers 
• Answer “How many?” questions 
• Compare numbers to groups of items

ADDITION & SUBTRACTION 
• Addition with objects 
• Subtraction with objects 
• Add and subtract within 5  

CATEGORIES, COLORS AND GEOMETRY 
• Classify objects into given categories 
• Correctly name shapes and colors 
• Analyze and compare shapes and colors

ADDITIONAL FEATURES: 
• Items, numbers and instructions are professionally narrated 
• Players are rewarded with positive encouragement 
• Parental controls: Turn off sounds, music, purchases and links to our other apps 
• We do not collect personal information from our users. 

COMMON CORE STANDARDS 
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.CC.A.1 
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.CC.A.2 
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.CC.B.4 
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.CC.B.5 
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.CC.C.7 
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.OA.A.1
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.MD.B.3 
• CCSS.Math.Content.K.G.A.2

===================================== 

Eggroll Games builds interactive toys that promote learning and engage children through colorful interactivity without confusing buttons or menus. 

Like us on Facebook at facebook.com/eggrollgames, follow us on Twitter @eggrollgames or drop in for a visit at EggrollGames.com!

results.description:
Help your animal friends through 100 challenges across 40+ first grade levels in this all new adventure across the African wild!

Playable by kids of all ages with lots of positive encouragement, professional narration and catchy music. Cute characters include giraffes, meerkats, lions, hippos, zebras, warthogs, cheetahs and rhinos!

Designed by parents and teachers, this app adheres to Common Core Standards for first grade math, science and more.

RELATES COUNTING TO MATH
• Counting by 2s, 5s and 10s
• Number sequences & patterns
• Greater than, less than, equal to
• Even & odd

ALGEBRAIC THINKING
• Find the missing sign
• Understanding the equal sign
• Determine the unknown number
• Understanding place value

ADDITION & SUBTRACTION
• Number sentences
• Objects, word problems, equations
• True or false
• Fluently add and subtract within 20

ADDITIONAL FEATURES:
• Items, numbers and instructions are professionally narrated

results.description:
Join learning explorer Emma as she helps Oleg the Owl, Chloe the Fox, and many more of her animal friends complete over 100 second grade learning challenges and find their way through the forest!

This app encourages the development of important second grade skills and is designed by parents and teachers to support learning used in real classrooms. Children explore engaging activities while building confidence and problem-solving abilities along the way.

FUN LEARNING ADVENTURE

Children help Emma and her animal friends solve challenges and progress through an exciting forest adventure. Each activity encourages curiosity, critical thinking, and independent learning in a playful and supportive environment.

FEATURES

• Over 100 engaging second grade learning challenges
• Colorful characters and environments that keep kids motivated
• Positive encouragement and helpful feedback throughout the adventure
• Activities designed with guidance from parents and teachers
• A learning experience that grows with your child

ADDITIONAL FEATURES

• Professionally narrated instructions and feedback
• Players are rewarded with positive encouragement
• Parental controls for music, purchases, and more
• We do not collect personal information from our users

EDUCATION STANDARDS

This app was designed with educational standards used in second grade classrooms in mind, helping children build confidence as they practice important early learning skills.

“As parents and teachers, we believe in friction-free learning for kids of all ages. We strive to build fun experiences with eye-popping visuals, professional narration, catchy music, and lots of positive encouragement.

Thank you for supporting us and making our vision come to life.

Have fun!!”

~ Blake, Mike & Amanda
Eggroll Games
